hypothesis: If Segment Anything Model 2 is fine-tuned end-to-end on physics-informed synthetic LPTEM videos spanning realistic SNR and resolution variations, then the resulting SAM-EM will outperform a U-Net baseline in Jaccard, F1, and J&F on held-out tests and yield centroid positions on real LPTEM data that agree with manual annotations because combining broad pretrained priors with domain-specific variability enables robust segmentation of weak-contrast nanoparticles.
